hypothesis: Augmenting a conservative uMLIP with a self-consistent charge-equilibration module and Ewald-summed Coulomb interactions will reduce the median cell-volume error after 0 K relaxation by at least 30% and halve the rate of unconverged optimizations for MOFs with open metal sites or framework counterions, relative to the same model without explicit electrostatics, when evaluated under the MOFSimBench protocols.
